article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: Classification matches the article’s clear left-leaning skepticism toward Trump’s claims, cites only the author’s own prose, and provides appropriate confidence for a clear lean. No attribution violations.
